generated_exposure.exposure_text: As we face growing global instability, it's crucial we don't forget the lessons of history. Mandatory service builds resilience and unity - something we can't afford to be without. Countries with conscription systems report higher civic engagement and better preparedness. Our grandchildren deserve this security. #NationalService #StrongNation
